content:
💡 hexhog | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Editing and inspecting the raw byte content of files.
✨ Key Features: • Configurable hex viewer/editor • Basic hex editing (edit/delete/insert bytes) • Select and copy/paste bytes • Installation via cargo, AUR, and Homebrew • Customizable themes and character sets
📖 Summary: Hexhog is a configurable hex viewer and editor written in Rust. It allows users to inspect and modify the byte-level content of files directly, offering basic editing features like byte insertion, deletion, copying, and pasting.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
